---
title: "tanking"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(hoopR)
library(rvest)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
games <- load_nba_team_box(seasons = 2019:2026) |> 
  mutate(win = ifelse(team_winner, 1, 0),
         month = month(game_date),
         late_season = ifelse(month >= 3, 1, 0)
  )
team_late_perf <- games |> 
  filter(late_season == 1) |> 
  group_by(team_abbreviation, season) |> 
  summarise(late_win_pct = mean(win), .groups = "drop")
  
```

```{r}
get_draft <- function(year) {
  url <- paste0("https://www.basketball-reference.com/draft/NBA_", year, ".html")
  page <- read_html(url)
  table <- page |> 
    html_node("table#stats") |> 
    html_table() |>
    row_to_names(row_number = 1) |> 
    clean_names() |> 
    mutate(
    pk = as.numeric(pk),
    g = as.numeric(g),
    mp = as.numeric(mp),
    pts = as.numeric(pts),
    ws = as.numeric(ws)
  ) |> 
    filter(!is.na(pk))
  
  table$draft_year <- year
  return(table)
}

draft_data <- map_dfr(2019:2025, get_draft)

top_picks <- draft_data |> 
  filter(pk <= 4) |> 
  select(player, draft_year)
```

```{r}
college_stats <- load_mbb_player_box(seasons = 2018:2025)
college_top <- college_stats
  filter(!is.na(points)) |> 
    
```
